context_for_next_testing_agent:
Admin Bill Payment Admin Control Flow - Iteration 86:

## Changes Verified:
1. Approve action now sets eko_failed on Eko failure (NOT auto-rejected)
2. New eko_failed status - admin controls what happens next
3. Admin options for eko_failed: retry, complete (manual), reject
4. Retry action: Only works on eko_failed requests, retries Eko API
5. Complete action: Works on pending and eko_failed, marks as completed manually
6. Reject action: Works on any non-completed request, refunds PRC
7. Frontend shows eko_failed badge with 3 action buttons (Retry/Complete/Reject)
8. No auto-reject - admin makes all decisions on failed Eko requests

## Valid Actions:
- approve: pending → completed (Eko success) OR eko_failed (Eko fail)
- retry: eko_failed → completed (retry success) OR stays eko_failed
- complete: pending/eko_failed → completed (manual)
- reject: any non-completed → rejected (PRC refunded)

## Test Files Updated:
- /app/tests/e2e/admin-bill-payment-approval.spec.ts (21 tests, 4 skipped)
- /app/backend/tests/test_admin_bill_payment_approval.py (17 tests, 7 skipped)

## Data Status:
- No pending requests currently (0)
- No eko_failed requests currently (0)
- Completed requests: 25
- Rejected requests: 6
- Old approved_manual: 6 (legacy data)

## Admin Navigation Path:
/admin → Login → Bill Payments → View all statuses

## eko_failed UI (when data available):
- Shows '⚠️ Eko Failed' badge in Pending filter
- Shows fail reason (e.g., 'Eko API: Server IP not whitelisted')
- Shows retry attempts count
- 3 action buttons: 🔄 Retry | ✅ Complete | ❌ Reject
